resources.description: Role-playing campaigns and narrative-driven gameplay. Perfect for immersive storytelling and lore enthusiasts.

resources.description: Entertaining let's plays with creative empire concepts and roleplay elements.

resources.description: Complete game mechanics reference with up-to-date patch information, maintained by the community.

resources.description: Active community with daily discussions, build sharing, memes, and strategy debates. Check the wiki for curated guides.

resources.description: Player-created guides covering everything from beginner tips to advanced min-maxing strategies.

resources.title: Stellaris Tech Tree

resources.description: Import your save files to visualize empire statistics, economy graphs, and galaxy maps. Requires Python installation.

resources.description: Calculate optimal fleet compositions and ship designs for combat efficiency.

resources.description: Official Paradox streams featuring developers, community events, and new DLC previews.

resources.description: Long-form roleplay campaigns with community interaction and creative empire concepts.

resources.description: Comprehensive UI improvements with better scaling, readability, and customization options.

resources.title: Gigastructural Engineering
resources.description: Megastructures on steroids. Build titanic structures including Dyson Spheres, Ring Worlds, and more.
